metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Net eSIM privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
metadata.keywords: privacy policy, data protection, net esim privacy, personal information

hero.heading: Your Data, Protected
hero.description: Commitment to protecting your personal information and ensuring transparency in how we handle your data.
hero.notice: If you're using Net Sim Platform, your information will be used to contact you for privacy policy

intro: NET NOVA GROUP LTD respects the privacy of our users and is committed to protecting personal information collected through the Net Sim platform.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.body: We may collect basic information such as name, email address, and device information when users interact with our services. This data helps us ensure a seamless connection across different regions and devices.

use.title: How We Use Information
use.body: Information collected is used to operate, maintain, and improve the Net Sim platform and to provide customer support. Specifically, we use device information to optimize network routing and account details to manage your eSIM subscriptions.

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.body: We take appropriate measures to protect user information from unauthorized access or disclosure. NetSim employs industry-standard encryption protocols and regularly audits our security practices to ensure your global data footprint remains private.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: For any privacy related inquiries please contact:
